学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 74th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 70-78 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle comprehensive universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly because Nanchang University's men's volleyball team won the championship in the university volleyball league, enhancing the university's sports reputation and public attention; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 43rd overall), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting a rise in application interest; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at the university, with some relevance to majors like Biological Sciences and Pharmacy in the enrollment plan; Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, Medical Imaging, and other medical majors, though not A-level disciplines, are socially popular majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine, Electronic Information Engineering, and other majors are highly recommended due to social popularity; Accounting is recommended; Biological Sciences falls under the broad category of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials (significantly discouraged); the number of science examinees in the province in 2025 is about 52,538, and the total number of examinees in 2026 is about 238,000 (including arts and sciences), with an estimated science proportion of about 68.6% in recent years, so the number of science examinees in 2026 is about 163,000, a significant increase from 2025, leading to sharply intensified competition; the first batch science cutoff in 2025 was 421 points, an increase of 31 points from 390 in 2024, reflecting an overall rise in competition level; Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, far from Xinjiang, requiring cross-province study; the university's enrollment scale in Xinjiang is small (20-24 science students), belonging to out-of-province enrollment, with limited impact of regional preference on Xinjiang examinees' applications.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 1940, moving forward to 1603 in 2024, and remaining basically stable at 1638 in 2025. Over the past three years, the overall trend has been forward. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1638. The enrollment plan for this university in Xinjiang for Liberal Arts was 12 students in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 16 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 15 students, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 74th, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle comprehensive universities. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively positive, mainly due to the Nanchang University men's volleyball team winning the championship, which increased overall attention. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 43rd overall), reflecting a rise in application attention. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Food Science and Engineering (A+) is the only A-level discipline of the university, which is not directly related to Liberal Arts majors. The Liberal Arts enrollment majors mainly include Economics, Management, Literature, and Law, without corresponding A-level discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics (divided observation), Journalism (clearly discouraged), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended), Administrative Management/Sociology and other majors have differentiated social popularity. In 2025, the number of Liberal Arts candidates in the province was about 24,010, and the total number of candidates in 2026 is about 238,000. Estimated by the recent proportion of Liberal Arts at about 31.4%, the number of Liberal Arts candidates in 2026 is about 75,000, a significant increase compared to 2025, leading to sharply intensified competition. The first batch of Liberal Arts undergraduate in 2025 had a score of 451, an increase of 26 points from 425 in 2024, reflecting an overall rise in competition level. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, far from Xinjiang, and is a cross-provincial enrollment. The enrollment scale of this university in Xinjiang for Liberal Arts is small (15-16 students), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment in 2026, and the significant increase in the number of Liberal Arts candidates in the province, based on the 2025 baseline of 1638, competition is expected to intensify and rankings to move forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1557, with a range of 1277-1837.
